name: discover cultural artifacts
notification: We found pre-war art and records in the bunker! (+[amount] culture)

name: squatters willing to work for you
notification: A skilled mechanic emerged from the rubble and joined our cause!

name: squatters wishing to settle under your rule
notification: A group of refugees wants to establish a new settlement under our protection!

name: your exploring unit receives training
notification: We found a military training manual in the ruins! Our troops learned new tactics!

name: survivors (adds population to a city)
notification: Survivors hiding in the ruins have joined our settlement! Population added to [cityName].

name: a stash of gold
notification: We discovered a supply cache in an old warehouse!

name: discover a lost technology
notification: An intact hard drive revealed the lost secrets of [techName]!
uniques: [1] free random researchable Tech(s) from the [Ruins Era]

name: advanced weaponry for your explorer
notification: Our scouts found a pre-war weapons cache in the ruins!
uniques: [This Unit] upgrades for free including special upgrades

name: reveal nearby Barbarian camps
notification: Warning signs point to raider activity nearby. Their camps are now visible!
uniques: Reveal up to [All] [Barbarian encampment] within a [10] tile radius

name: find a crudely-drawn map
notification: We found a damaged GPS device with partial map data!
uniques: From a randomly chosen tile [4] tiles away from the ruins, reveal tiles up to [4] tiles away with [80]% chance
